reviews.text: Love going this, I've never been this my first time! Don't let the outside make you not come! The inside was extremely nice and the food and service was perfect! Our server was a very friendly gentleman and he helped us with some very unusual questions, the food was amazing I got the beef wrapped asparagus with teriyaki 10/10, my mom got the deep fried crab rolls and it was to die for! Overall I think this place needs to be recognized more than it has been, I feel if the outside was redone than this place would thrive in business terms! Great experience, beautiful inside, amazing server, great food and kind people! Also pretty affordable!!

reviews.text: Great sushi. I've been to most of the sushi restaurants in McHenry county, this place continues to be my favorite for quality. The Maguru salad and the peppercorn tuna are my favorite menu options.  Miso soup is also better than most. The staff is friendly. Sometimes they don't have experienced bar tenders, so I stick to beers when I dine in.

reviews.text: Wow what a great place! Do NOT let the outside scare you away from it, this was our first time here. Yes they are a little pricier BUT you absolutely get your moneys worth! We are avid sushi eaters and have tried many places and this was the first time dining somewhere we didn‚Äôt feel that they were stingy on the sushi at all! In fact I‚Äôve never seen sushi rolls as BIG as they were here! Had the mini Godzilla roll‚Ä¶.EXCELLENT! Crazy Roll, rainbow roll and Philly roll‚Ä¶all very good! reviews.text:
Update: yup! Still high quality and generous portions! We were the only ones for lunch on a Wednesday... They need more customers. $17 bento box in the images...
5 stars doesn't mean it is a 5 star restaurant; it means I really, really liked it!            We wanted something a little different without driving too far.We were so happy we gave this place a try.  2 adults, 3 kids (ages 2-6).  Fancy enough for a date (we forgot about the mini golf and batting cages around us once inside), casual enough to stop in after taking the kids to the park. Sushi was prepared generously.  The ingredients were very fresh.  No plastic grass here!  My sashimi slices were on a fine sea kelp that was on a shiso leaf which sat ontop of a huge mound of finely shredded daikon.  The miso soup was very flavorful (I only got 2-3 sips because my kids hijacked my bowl).  The prices were amazingly reasonable (Sushi rolls starting at $3.00!).  The kids got the chicken fried rice and chicken noodles which were both adult portions running at $10 ea.  I wish they had children's portions, although I didn't ask.  Anyhoo, we had a huge amount to take home.  I definitely prefer this to Bistro Wasabi, even though this is a BYOB establishment.    Service was attentive and prompt.  It's my new favorite neighborhood restaurant!
reviews.raw:
Nancy E
Local Guide ¬∑ 75 reviews ¬∑ 118 photos

reviews.text: Don't let the outside fool you. This place is 6 stars for service and food quality. The prices are a bit higher, but the food quality and presentation, as is the service, is excellent. The outside looks decrepit. I wasn't sure they were even still open. I had to go in to check... the inside is lovely, white tablecloths, clean restrooms, lovely interior... don't let the outside scare you. I will return!

reviews.text: Golden Rolls has the great sushi in the whole city at such a fair and reasonable price point. Their sushi is phenomenal! The serving is really good, they put more fish, crab, meat, or anything than the rice. All of the toppings and inclusions are great. They also have cool beverages. The sushi is really fresh and the way they serve it is really creative. They also offer some fresh oysters and clams. Their sashimi is also different from other stores that also offer it. Their fresh different kind of fish in sashimi is really great plus it comes with an awesome dip and sauce. Their waiter and waitresses were really nice. All of them are decent, professional, and very accommodating. They all know how to treat their customer so well. The customer service is outstanding. All of the employees are well-trained. This place is huge, clean, and bright. The atmosphere inside is very calming, relaxing, and amazing. Their seating is plenty and wide. Golden Rolls is really worth trying! I am really impressed and entertained. Really love this place! See you again soon guys! Kudos to all of you!
reviews.raw:
Lincoln Wheeler

reviews.text: My husband and I order take out from here often. I typically go for sushi and a house salad and he opts for the golden shrimp and gyoza beef appetizers. Every time, the food is packaged perfectly (I appreciate how the separate the hot food from cold) and it comes within the time estimated when ordering. There is usually a girl who takes our order over the phone and she is so sweet and the guy who delivers it is great too! The salmon nigiri is some of the freshest and BEST I have ever had. The portion of the salmon is HUGE! My husband is a big fan of golden sauce, and it is really hard to find a good one! He loves the one from Golden Rolls!  We are so grateful for the delivery option and to have a delicious sushi place in town! :)

reviews.text:
Without a doubt the best choice within 25 miles for fresh sushi! Have eaten here dozens of times...always excellent. If you want good, honest, fresh, generous portions of sushi/sashimi, this is your place. Yes, they offer what I consider 'poser' rolls...mayo, cream cheese, etc., but if you want a real experience, order amaebi - raw shrimp - they come with the fried, intact heads...crunchy and delicious. Every other sushi place in this area pales by comparison....I've been to most of them.
